official_standard.overall: Large, affectionate, long-bodied cat with striking blue eyes. Known for going limp like a 'ragdoll' when picked up. Sturdy and substantial large-breed cat.
official_standard.personality: Quiet, laid-back, and very affectionate. Intelligent 'puppy-like' cat that follows people. Very tolerant of children and other pets.

physical_traits.head: Broad with a flat plane between the ears.
physical_traits.body: Long, substantial large frame, sturdy bone structure.
physical_traits.legs: Substantial bone with large round paws and tufted toes.
physical_traits.tail: Plumed and proportionate to body length.
physical_traits.coat: Semi-long, silky, soft and plush texture.
